brief:
Execute the user-APPROVED ralplan consensus plan: Stage-Aware Selective Multi-Agent + Anti-Drift for agent-lab. Approved plan: /Users/yoonjong/Projects/agent-lab/.gjc/plans/ralplan/2026-06-19-1737-8485/pending-approval.md (Planner stage-09, Architect stage-10 BLOCK, revision stage-11, Architect stage-12 APPROVE, Critic stage-13 OKAY, final stage-14). Source spec: .gjc/specs/deep-interview-stage-aware-selective-multiagent.md. Project root: /Users/yoonjong/Projects/agent-lab.

SHARED CONSTRAINTS (apply to every story):
- LEVER CORRECTION (verified from source at execution kickoff): turn_modes.resolve_mode_contract is DEAD CODE (zero callers in src/). The real single-vs-panel lever is the consensus_mode parameter of room_turn_flow.continue_room_round and run_room (default False), consumed at room_turn_flow.py:277 (elif consensus_mode: run_consensus_agent_rounds [PANEL] else run_agent_rounds [single]). The phase-aware routing hook therefore lives INSIDE continue_room_round and run_room (run_meta phase + turn_profile param already available), NOT in resolve_mode_contract. Plan intent (phase route table, room-layer phase, OFF-parity, spine untouched, telemetry observational) unchanged; only hook location corrected. Recorded in ledger.
- EXTEND existing code; NO new parallel routing layer. All changes additive + flag-gated. Per-flag OFF-parity is PRIMARY: STAGE_ROUTING unset => routing path byte/shape-identical; ANTIDRIFT unset => anti-drift path byte/shape-identical; OFF-parity tests use frozen time.
- User explicit turn_profile ALWAYS overrides phase default: when turn_profile param non-empty (loop/team/quick/divergence/specialist) phase default NOT applied. divergence keeps its dedicated contract. Phase default applies ONLY when turn_profile empty/None AND STAGE_ROUTING on AND phase_default not None.
- Approval spine UNTOUCHED: plan_workflow._mirror_verified_loop_status, approve_plan, verified_loop semantics, consensus loop caps unchanged. Acceptance = deterministic mechanism-firing unit tests; telemetry observation-only, never a gate, never affects fan-out. Dynamic model pool + sovereignty DEFERRED (no dynamic-pool code); no learned orchestrator.
- Phase route table: panel (consensus_mode True) = DISCUSS, PLAN_GATE, PLAN_REJECT, DRAFT, PEER_REVIEW, REFINE; solo (False) = EXECUTE_QUEUE, DRY_RUN, MERGE_REVIEW, VERIFY, REPAIR; defer (None) = CLARIFY/INTAKE/MISSION_DEFINE.
- Both flags default-OFF, registered in runtime_flags.py FLAG_REGISTRY (feature) + .env.example + /api/health/flags default false: AGENT_LAB_STAGE_ROUTING, AGENT_LAB_ANTIDRIFT.
- Verification gate per story: focused new tests, then make test-fast (raise tests/test_integration_registry.py fast-bucket budget if needed), then ruff check + ruff format --check + mypy on changed files (mypy stays at 244 baseline, zero new). No suppressed warnings, no weakened tests.

@goal: Stage-aware routing core plus RoutingDecisionLog telemetry
Implement phase-aware single-vs-panel routing behind AGENT_LAB_STAGE_ROUTING (default off). Files: src/agent_lab/runtime_flags.py (register flag), .env.example (document), src/agent_lab/turn_modes.py (pure helper phase_default_consensus(phase) -> bool | None per the route table: panel True, solo False, CLARIFY/INTAKE/MISSION_DEFINE/unknown None=defer; plus optional phase kwarg on resolve_mode_contract applying the table when STAGE_ROUTING on and no explicit profile, OFF-parity preserved), src/agent_lab/room_turn_flow.py (in BOTH continue_room_round and run_room: after run_meta loaded and turn_profile resolved compute active_phase = plan_workflow_phase(run_meta) when is_plan_workflow_active(run_meta) else mission_loop phase; when STAGE_ROUTING on AND turn_profile empty/None AND phase_default not None override the local consensus_mode BEFORE _set_active_turn_flags; dispatch shape at :277/:680 unchanged), src/agent_lab/mode_router.py (extend record_mode_route/RoutingDecisionLog to capture phase + resolved consensus_mode, observational; no new write when STAGE_ROUTING off; never affects fan-out). Tests tests/test_stage_routing.py (AC1 phase route sets consensus_mode panel True/solo False on resolved routing not select_mode; AC2 divergence unchanged; AC3 explicit profile overrides; AC4 default only when no explicit profile; AC5 STAGE_ROUTING-off byte-identical frozen time; AC12 CLARIFY defers) and tests/test_routing_telemetry.py (AC11 observational, no fan-out effect, no write when off) plus active-phase helper unit test (plan_workflow precedence) and consensus_mode/parallel_rounds non-double-count assertion. Record lever correction in ledger via annotate.

@goal: Anti-drift A state-externalization re-injection in panel turns
Implement anti-drift A behind AGENT_LAB_ANTIDRIFT (default off): re-inject confirmed established facts + ledger into panel agent context each panel turn to keep rounds grounded. Files: src/agent_lab/runtime_flags.py (register flag), .env.example (document), panel context-build path (room_turn_flow / room_consensus_rounds / context_bundle as appropriate) to prepend clarity.format_facts_block(run) (reuse renderer, no duplication) plus ledger/established-facts context when ANTIDRIFT on and turn is panel (consensus_mode True); solo turns keep existing light injection (no change). Reuse clarity.format_facts_block and clarity.established_facts; no parallel facts store. Tests tests/test_antidrift.py (AC7 A re-injection in panel each turn with facts/ledger block, solo light/unchanged; AC6 ANTIDRIFT-off byte-identical frozen time; flag-off no injection delta).

@goal: Anti-drift B unanimity red-team plus fresh-eyes critic seat plus final verification
Implement anti-drift B + fresh-eyes critic seat behind AGENT_LAB_ANTIDRIFT (default off), then comprehensive final verification. B: inside room_consensus_rounds.run_consensus_agent_rounds / consensus_gate path (reached ONLY when consensus_mode True, panel-only by construction); on immediate 0-objection unanimity (reuse existing consensus_gate signals/objection detection, do not weaken consensus_gate_met) force exactly one extra red-team/divergence round respecting loop caps (loop_budget_caps/max rounds); never touch approval spine (no APPROVED, no _mirror_verified_loop_status, no approve_plan, no verified_loop mutation). Fresh-eyes seat: in PEER_REVIEW plan-workflow panel (run_plan_peer_review_round) add ONE cold-context critic (goal + plan.md/artifact only, reuse ralplan fresh-spawn cold pattern) when ANTIDRIFT on; absent other phases and when off. Files: src/agent_lab/room_consensus_rounds.py, src/agent_lab/consensus_gate.py (read-only reuse, do not weaken), src/agent_lab/plan_workflow.py PEER_REVIEW round path (additive seat only, spine helpers untouched). Tests tests/test_antidrift.py extended (AC8 B fires on unanimity in consensus path, unreachable in solo; AC9 B respects caps, spine unchanged no APPROVED/running; AC10 PEER_REVIEW has cold-context critic seat, absent elsewhere and when off). Final verification AC13 approval-spine + verified-loop regression green; AC14 OFF-parity BOTH flags off byte-identical frozen time; AC15 full make test-fast green + mypy 244 baseline + ruff check + ruff format --check clean.
gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

Record lever correction in ledger via annotate.
goals.evidence: Stage-aware routing core + RoutingDecisionLog telemetry shipped behind AGENT_LAB_STAGE_ROUTING (default off). turn_modes.py: stage_routing_enabled, phase_default_consensus (panel/solo/defer table), pure stage_route_consensus resolver. mode_router.py: resolve_active_phase (plan_workflow phase precedence over mission_loop) + observational record_routing_decision (run.json mission_loop.stage_route). room_turn_flow.py: _resolve_stage_routing helper called in continue_room_round + run_room before _set_active_turn_flags (the verified consensus_mode lever). runtime_flags.py + .env.example registered the flag. LEVER CORRECTION (ledger-annotated): resolve_mode_contract was dead code; real lever is consensus_mode param. Verify: 85 focused/red-team passed; make test-fast 1490 passed/1 skipped/0 failed; ruff clean; mypy ratchet 243/243 (G001 delta 0 proven via revert-test; fixed pre-existing CLARIFY clarity.py:442 var-annotated). OFF-parity primary invariant proven. Approval spine untouched.

Files: src/agent_lab/runtime_flags.py (register flag), .env.example (document), panel context-build path (room_turn_flow / room_consensus_rounds / context_bundle as appropriate) to prepend clarity.format_facts_block(run) (reuse renderer, no duplication) plus ledger/established-facts context when ANTIDRIFT on and turn is panel (consensus_mode True); solo turns keep existing light injection (no change). goals.evidence: Anti-drift A (state-externalization re-injection) shipped behind AGENT_LAB_ANTIDRIFT (default off). turn_modes.antidrift_enabled (shared with G003). context_bundle.py: _format_decision_ledger (compact run.json goal_ledger, capped, garbage-tolerant) + _format_grounding_block (panel turn + flag on => re-anchor header + confirmed facts + decision ledger; solo/off => plain facts block, byte-identical OFF-parity). Both injection sites (build_slim_consensus_bundle, build_context_bundle) route through it with consensus_mode; the prior plain facts injection is REPLACED (no duplication). runtime_flags.py + .env.example registered the flag. Reuses format_facts_block/established_facts (no parallel store). Verify: 38 focused passed; make test-fast 1519 passed/1 skipped/0 failed; ruff clean; mypy ratchet 243/243 (delta 0). OFF-parity proven; approval spine + G001 routing untouched.
